titleStmt.title: SII 25.197: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 197. (A.R. No. 197 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This epigraph may palaeographically be assigned to 13th century.

It records the assignment of income from taxes such as antarāyam, kōyiṟṟampēṟu, kuḍimai, etc., collected on the iṟaiyili lands of the temple of the deity Tiru Uśāttāṉam-uḍaiya-nāyaṉār, upto the tenth year, to meet the services (tiruppaṇi) of the god. The village accountant (ūr-kaṇakku) Śākkāṉam-uḍaiyāṉ Uttamappiriyaṉ undertook to provide the income for the temple. The decision to this effect was taken by the assembly of Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśanich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam and the same was agreed to by several signatories (names are mentioned). Mahājanapriyaṉ (Makāchanappiriyan), the ūr-kaṇakku are referred to at the end as one of the signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
§ tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrāja[rāja*] devaṟ
ku yāṇṭu 10 Āvatu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷaku
lācaṉiccaturvvetimaṅkalattu kūṭṭapperuma
kkaḷ Eḻuttu . nammūr kaṇakku cākkāṉamuṭaiyā
ṉ Uttamappiriyaṉ kaṇkaṇṭu nammur Uṭai
yār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉārkku pattā
vatu varaiyum Ūrkkiḻ Iṟaiyiliyāṉa nilattu
kku Antarāyam koyiṟṟamapeṟu naṉaip
piṭṭuRead ‘niṉaippiṭṭu’taṇṭum kuṭimaikācu UḷḷaṭṭaRead ‘uḷḷiṭṭa’vaṟkaṅkaḷum
Innāya(ṉāya)ṉārkku tiruppaṇikkuṭalāka cantirā
titta varaiyum kuṭutto
m Ippaṭiyāl vantaṉa Ūrile Āḷam pu
kkile viḻukkāṭu Iṭṭukkoḷḷa paṇṇu
vate Ippaṭiyāl vantaṉa cantirātitta varai
yum tavirttom . paṇiyāl Ūrkaṇakku cāk
kāṉa muṭaiyāṉ Uttamappiriyaneḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai kaḷattūr Aravintalo
caṉapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irā
yūr muṭkoṭṭi nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ makaṉ citara
maṇṭayapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai
Irāmpalūr tirunilakaṇṭa paṭṭaṉ Eḻut
tu Ippaṭikku Ivai tirupputtūr Uyya
vanta paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai U
ttamaṉ nārāyaṇa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippa
ṭikku Ivai Irāmpalūr Aravi
nta locaṉapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai Irāyūr muṭkkoṭṭipaṟma
ṉāpa paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cu
ntarattoḷuṭaiyāṉ paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu I
ppaṭikku Ivai Ūrkkaṇakku makācaṉappiriya
neḻuttu U
Digital edition of SII 25.197 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
